definition.value: OWL 2 ontology derived from the PV-Collada 2.0 XSD schema. Provides vocabulary for PV system circuit topology, physical layout geometry, and component product data, within the MDS-Onto builtenv domain.

scopeNote.value: Covers three interlocking layers: (1) a product library of typed PV components (modules, inverters, cables, etc.); (2) a circuit topology describing how those components are wired together; and (3) a physical 3-D layout associating circuit positions with geometric rack instances. ModuleLayout is the cross-domain bridge between layers 2 and 3.

definition.value: A typed product specification for a physical PV balance-of-system component, as declared in the PV-Collada components library.
Enumeration of absorber semiconductor materials used in PV cells.
Enumeration of gap categories between racks on a tracker torque tube.
Product-level specification for an AC inverter combiner panel.
A rack mounted on a solar tracker; requires tracker_azimuth, and must not carry fixed-tilt geometry fields.
Enumeration of drive coupling configurations for single-axis trackers.
The complete electrical circuit description of a PV system, rooted at a single circuit_root element that is a transformer, AC combiner, or inverter.
Enumeration of PV module form-factor types.
Product-level specification for a DC string combiner box.
Enumeration of electrical power type (AC or DC) for cables.
Enumeration of rating standards used for inverter efficiency measurement.
Enumeration of post installation inclination modes.
An instance of an inverter in the electrical circuit, referencing a product inverter specification and containing MPPT inputs.
A directed cable connection from a circuit instance to its electrical parent, carrying a reference to the cable product and the installed length.
Enumeration of table mounting types.
Enumeration of solar tracker axis configurations.
Product-level specification for an AC step-up or isolation transformer, including rated power, voltage ratio, efficiency, and loss parameters.
Enumeration of module mounting orientations on a rack.
Enumeration of PV inverter deployment topologies.
Product-level specification for a single maximum-power-point-tracking channel on an inverter, recording the number of parallel input strings.
Enumeration of structural post functions.
Enumeration of cable conductor materials.
A co-planar group of modules mounted in a fixed or tracker configuration, described by a COLLADA geometry rectangle representing the rack surface.

scopeNote.value: Declared as a subclass of mds:Racking. Business rule (Schematron): if rack_type = fixed_tilt then azimuth and tilt are required and tracker fields are forbidden; if rack_type = tracker then tracker_azimuth is required and fixed-tilt fields are forbidden. See pvc:FixedTiltRack and pvc:TrackerRack subclasses.

definition.value: An ordered collection of power optimizer instances within a string.
Enumeration of rack mounting strategies.
An instantiated element in the electrical circuit topology of a PV system, referencing a PVComponent product specification.
Enumeration of cross-sectional shapes for a single-axis tracker torque tube.
A vertical structural member that supports a rack, tracker torque tube, or fence, driven into or anchored to the ground.
Enumeration of structural post cross-section shapes.
Abstract root class for all entities described in the PV-Collada schema.
A physical or geometric object in the 3-D layout of a PV installation, represented in the COLLADA scene graph.
Enumeration of cell junction or contact architectures used in PV modules.
Cross-domain bridge entity that maps a module's position in the electrical circuit (position_in_string) to its physical location on a rack (row, column) via a reference to an instance_rack_ref.

scopeNote.value: This is the key join point between circuit topology and physical 3-D layout in PV-Collada.

definition.value: A triangulated 3-D surface model representing the site terrain.
A single MPPT channel instance within an inverter circuit instance, containing one or more strings or DC combiners.
A space between two racks on a single-axis tracker torque tube, occupied by a motor drive or a flexible joint.
An instance of a power optimizer in the circuit, connected via cable_to_parent and optionally cable_to_neighbor.
An ordered collection of modules within a string, each described by a ModuleLayout that maps a circuit position to a physical rack cell.
Top-level project metadata for a PV-Collada file, recording system capacity, string and module counts, geographic projection, and boundary.

scopeNote.value: Declared as a subclass of mds:PhotovoltaicSite; the pvc:Project adds schema-level attributes (capacity, module/string counts, projection).

definition.value: A series-connected string of PV modules, containing either a module array or an optimizer array.
A group of mechanically linked racks in a single row, potentially including posts and gaps. When the table is a tracker, all constituent racks share the same rotation around the tracker axis.
Product-level specification for a PV module, capturing its physical dimensions, electrical parameters at STC, and cell technology.

scopeNote.value: Corresponds to module_type_object in pvcollada_schema_2.0.xsd. Declared as a subclass of mds:PhotovoltaicModule to align with the MDS-Onto builtenv PV-module hierarchy.

definition.value: Product-level specification for a PV inverter, capturing its AC/DC power ratings, MPPT voltage window, efficiency, and parasitic consumption.

scopeNote.value: Corresponds to inverter_type_object. Declared as a subclass of mds:Inverter to align with MDS-Onto.

definition.value: Product-level specification for a module-level power optimizer.
A rack mounted at a fixed tilt angle; requires azimuth and tilt, and must not carry tracker geometry fields.
An instance of a DC combiner box in the electrical circuit.
Product-level specification for a PV cable, including cross-sectional area, conductor count, material, and electrical resistance.
An instance of a transformer in the electrical circuit.
An instance of an AC combiner panel in the electrical circuit.
Slope of a tracker torque tube in the direction of its azimuth.
Number of vertices in the triangulated terrain surface mesh.
Associates a circuit inverter instance with its MPPT channel instances.
EPSG code for the coordinate projection used to relate local (x,y,z) coordinates to geocoordinates (e.g., 'EPSG:3857').
Associates an inverter product with its deployment topology.
Ratio of rear-side to front-side quantum efficiency for bifacial modules (dimensionless, 0–1).
Length of the module in the longest dimension.
Conductor cross-sectional area.
Total number of PV cells in the module.
Associates a gap with its function (motor or joint).
AC impedance per kilometre of cable.
Number of triangular faces in the terrain surface mesh.
Associates an optimizer instance with the cable that daisy-chains it to an adjacent optimizer.
Associates a post with its cross-section shape.
Number of parallel internal cell strings within the module.
Maximum inverter AC output power.
True if the gap is rigid; false if it allows torque tube flexion.
Power consumed by the inverter during normal operation.
Maximum inverter DC input power.
Weighted efficiency computed per the standard specified by efficiencyStandardType.
Nominal diameter of the single-axis tracker torque tube.
Associates a string with its module array (direct-wire configuration).
Number of cells arranged along the width dimension.
Name of the product manufacturer.
Height of the lower edge of a fixed rack above ground level.
Nominal width of the gap between the two adjacent racks.
Total number of tables in the physical layout.
Maximum efficiency as AC output power / DC input power.
Inverter AC output power at rating conditions.
Column index of the module slot on the physical rack.
Height of the tracker torque tube centre above ground.
Specifies the conductor material of a cable product.
Associates a table with its mounting type (fixed or tracker).
Associates a post with its installation inclination (vertical or perpendicular).
Module open-circuit voltage at Standard Test Conditions.
Azimuth of a tracker torque tube. Rotation is a right-hand rotation around this axis; e.g., positive rotation at azimuth 180° is westward.
DC electrical resistance per kilometre of cable.
Maximum angle formed in the torque axis at a gap between racks.
Azimuth angle of a fixed rack (direction modules face).
Total length of the post including the underground portion.
Cross-domain bridge property: links a circuit ModuleLayout to the physical rack instance (via instance_rack_ref) that holds the module.

scopeNote.value: This is the critical join between circuit topology and physical layout.

definition.value: Associates an inverter product with its MPPT channel specifications.
Nominal AC output voltage of the inverter.
Associates a string with its optimizer array (optimized configuration).
Links a circuit transformer instance to its product specification.
Nominal AC output voltage of the transformer.
Pair of values (negative, positive) giving the nominal maximum rotation angles from horizontal for a single-axis tracker, e.g., '-45 45'.

scopeNote.value: Unit: °; encoded as two space-separated floats.

definition.value: Maximum DC voltage for MPPT tracking.
Installed length of this cable run.

scopeNote.value: Unit: m (assumed SI default; verify against project file)

definition.value: Associates a module product with its form-factor type.
Name of the PV project.
Total number of PV modules in the system.
Associates a rack with its mounting type (fixed_tilt or tracker).
Standby power consumed by the inverter when not generating.
Row index of the module slot on the physical rack.
Name of the company or organisation responsible for the project.
Specifies the rating standard (CEC or EU) used to compute the efficiency_standard_value.
Number of columns of modules on the rack.
Module voltage at the maximum power point under STC.

label.en: voltage at maximum power point at STC

definition.value: Model name of the product (e.g., 'Q.Tron Classic 440W').
Associates an MPPT input with its connected PV strings.
Associates a post with its structural function (rack, tracker, fence).
Number of series-connected cells in a single internal string.
Depth (thickness) of the module.
Links a circuit inverter instance to its product specification.
Width of the module orthogonal to its longest dimension.
ISO 3166 alpha-2 or alpha-3 country code for the project location.
Total AC capacity at the inverter rating condition.
Tilt angle from horizontal of a fixed rack.
Module power at Standard Test Conditions (STC).
Associates a single-axis tracker table with its torque tube cross-section shape.
Specifies the cell junction or contact architecture used in a module.
Nominal DC voltage for MPPT tracking.
Links a CableTo connection to the cable product it uses.
Associates a tracker table with its axis configuration.
Links a circuit optimizer instance to its product specification.
Total DC nameplate capacity of the PV system at STC.
Number of rows of modules on the rack.
Change in short-circuit current per degree Celsius.
Maximum flexion angle of a non-rigid joint gap.
Number of parallel inputs (strings) that can be connected.
Associates a rack with the mounting orientation of its modules.
Module short-circuit current at Standard Test Conditions.
No-load loss in the transformer iron core, independent of output current.
Specifies the semiconductor absorber material of the cells in a module.
Number of cells arranged along the length dimension.
Maximum DC input current to the inverter.
Number of MPPT channels on the inverter.
UTC offset in hours; positive values are East of UTC.
Change in open-circuit voltage per degree Celsius.
Associates a circuit instance with the cable that connects it to its electrical parent node.
Total number of series-connected module strings.
Equivalent series resistance used to compute winding (copper) losses.
Nominal depth of the post driven underground.
AC power limit imposed by the grid interconnection agreement.
Distance from the rack surface to the tracker torque tube centre.
Minimum DC voltage for MPPT tracking.
Spacing between modules in the row direction on a rack.
Links a rack to the module product specification it holds, via the module_id IDREF in the PV-Collada schema.
IANA timezone string for the project location (e.g., 'America/Phoenix').
Associates an MPPT input with a DC combiner that aggregates strings.
Associates a single-axis tracker table with its drive coupling type.
Slope of a fixed rack in the direction 90° counterclockwise from azimuth.
Inverter DC input power at rating conditions.
Spacing between modules in the column direction on a rack.
Associates a cable with its power type (AC or DC).
Links a circuit DC combiner instance to its product specification.
True if the transformer automatically disconnects from the grid at night.
Links a circuit AC combiner instance to its product specification.
Nominal AC input voltage of the transformer.
Module current at the maximum power point under STC.

label.en: current at maximum power point at STC

definition.value: Drawing or document reference associated with the project.
Number of electrical conductors in the cable.
Change in maximum power per degree Celsius.
Associates a module array with its constituent ModuleLayout entries, each describing the position of one module in the string and in the rack.
Sequential index of this module within its series string (1-based).
Diameter of the post cross-section.
